hero.subtitle_line1: Get control of your finances – and build a company investors want to fund.
hero.subtitle_line2: We help you make the right decisions before mistakes become expensive.

about.title: A team you can trust
about.subtitle: We enable you to make better decisions—faster and with greater confidence.
about.description: We work with startups and growth companies that want more than just control over their numbers—they want to build companies ready for growth, investment, and long-term profitability. Through working with companies at different stages, we have seen the same challenges repeat themselves: founders who lack visibility over cash flow, companies that grow without understanding profitability, and investor meetings where the financial answers are not clear enough. That’s where we come in. We combine operational experience with strategic financial expertise to give you what you actually need as a founder—not just reports, but a solid basis for decision-making. All at fixed prices—we know how expensive it is to hire an experienced CFO.
expertise_list: Building financial models for investors and boards
Cash flow forecasting and runway control

team.name: Adiam Negassie
team.bio: Senior leader with 18+ years of experience across Oil & Gas, IT, and Waste Management sectors. Has founded multiple companies in tech and energy, served on boards of listed companies, and brings strong expertise in strategy, operations, and business growth. Holds a degree in Computer Engineering.

team.name: Benjamin Bye
team.bio: Former CIO at Pareto Wealth Management with 20+ years in finance. Benjamin has assisted countless startups in raising significant capital and driving growth.

team.name: Amit Mantri
team.bio: Strategy expert with 15+ years of experience. Amit specializes in analyzing complex metrics like CAC and LTV to identify scaling drivers for growth companies.

team.name: Raman Parwal
team.bio: Specialist in M&A and group strategy with a background from Deloitte and EY. Raman focuses on establishing robust processes and cash flow clarity.

services.label: EXPERTISE
services.title: Our Services
services.introTitle: We act as your strategic CFO
services.introDescription: We help you gain full control of cash position, burn rate, and capital needs—and build financial models that actually drive decision-making.
points: Gain full control of cash position, burn rate, and capital needs
Build financial models that actually drive decisions
Understand what drives profitability (CAC, LTV, margins)
Prepare for investment—before you need capital
virtualCfoPoints: Flexibility to scale up and down
Experience across multiple startups and industries
services.closing: You pay for impact—not a job title.
services.footer: Here are some of our services—we tailor them based on your needs.

budget.title: OPERATING BUDGET
budget.description: A comprehensive operating budget that gives you full control of revenues, costs and strategic milestones.

liquidity.title: LIQUIDITY & BALANCE
liquidity.description: Monthly liquidity budget that shows you the runway, burn rate and when you need to finance the next phase.

forecast.title: ECONOMIC FORECASTS
forecast.description: Investor-ready 3-5 year forecasts with detailed revenue models and documented assumptions that strengthen trust in the investor dialogue.

virtual_cfo.title: VIRTUAL CFO
virtual_cfo.description: The 'Hero' Service offering complete financial leadership and strategic oversight for your premium needs.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.description: Many startups struggle with financial control
challenge.context: For early-phase companies, it is often cost control and realistic forecasts – not profitability – that determine survival.
points: Weak or inadequate budgets for further growth
Budget that doesn't reflect actual cash movements
Financial forecasts that lack structure and credibility
No clear ownership of financial management before and after investment
Weak company structure that is not suitable for growth
Lack of CFO competence in critical growth phases
challenge.stat_text: of Norwegian startups lack good enough budgets that investors trust.

customer_stories.title: Trusted by visionary founders
customer_stories.subtitle: How we've helped Norwegian and international startups secure funding and scale.

stories.text: CFO Eksperten transformed our messy spreadsheets into an investor-ready model that helped us close our Series A.
The strategic foresight Raman provided was instrumental in our expansion. More than just accountants, they are partners.
Fixed pricing and fast delivery. They understood exactly what our board needed to see.

booking.title: Ready to scale your business?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to contact us for a non-binding chat about your needs.

q1.question: What do your services cost?
q1.answer: We offer fixed pricing on all our services, so you know exactly what you are paying for. Prices vary depending on complexity and scope – please check our pricing section or contact us for a non-binding quote.

q2.question: How long does it take to deliver the startup package?
q2.answer: We typically deliver within 14 business days after receiving the necessary information. For urgent requests, we can offer faster delivery at an additional cost.

q3.question: What information do you need from us?
q3.answer: We map your needs in an initial meeting. Typically, we require a business plan, historical financial statements, cost structure, and revenue assumptions. We provide templates and build on the information you already have.

q4.question: Why should I use CFO Eksperten?
q4.answer: Our services are ideal if you do not need a full-time CFO but require assistance with financial strategy, budgets, and forecasts. We also offer ongoing support through our Virtual CFO service.

q5.question: Can you help with investor presentations?
q5.answer: Yes – CFO Eksperten can assist with analysis, financial modeling, forecasting, due diligence, and investor communication.

footer.description: Premium financial management and CFO services for startups and growth companies.

header.title: Transparent and predictable
header.subtitle: Choose the package that fits your stage
header.description: Fixed pricing with no hidden costs. CFO support is optional for Package 1 and 2—and mandatory, included in the Scaling Package.

plans.label: Package 01
plans.name: Basic Package
plans.tagline: A solid financial foundation for those in the early startup phase.
features: Cash flow forecast (12 months) + burn rate

meta.bestFor: Pre-revenue or < $1M revenue, up to 3 employees

plans.label: Package 02
plans.name: Startup Package
plans.tagline: Everything you need to meet investors with credibility and structure.

meta.bestFor: < $5M revenue, up to 10 employees, preparing for a funding round

plans.label: Package 03
plans.name: Scaling Package
plans.tagline: For companies raising capital or scaling actively—with close CFO support.
features: 3 months of ongoing CFO support included

meta.bestFor: Companies in active growth or fundraising phase

footer.note: All prices are excl. VAT · Fixed pricing—no hourly surprises.
